_comment: Species: Void Beast (虚空兽) from A World Worth Protecting. Canonical definition with all 13 fields per the Er Gen simulation spec. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every state described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Void Beast

canonical.appearance: Formless beast of void 8 m, body is a tear in reality
canonical.size: 8 m adult, 0 jin (void); true form spans void
canonical.behavior: Hunts by stepping through void; cultivates by absorbing void-essence
canonical.relationships: Enemy of all who enter the void
canonical.ecology: Inferred AFTER canonical fields; see ecosystem definitions.

inner_dan_properties.canon_note: void_beast — no specific inner dan documented in canon

art_direction.generator: single canonical definition drives 10 life-state variants
art_direction.note: Per art-direction directive: build generators, not assets.
